content:
# AI Tools for Email Marketing Automation in 2026

Email marketing automation with AI can save you hours and boost your conversions. Let's explore the best tools!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: Email Copy That Converts

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] can help you write compelling email copy, subject lines, and sequences that actually get results.

### Rytr for Email Marketing
- **Subject line generator**: Get dozens of options to A/B test
- **Email sequences**: Write complete drip campaigns
- **Personalization tokens**: Make each email feel personal

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Grammarly: Professional Emails

Grammarly ensures every email you send is professional, clear, and error-free — essential for building trust with your subscribers.

### Grammarly for Email Marketing
- **Grammar & spelling**: Never send an error again
- **Tone detection**: Make sure your emails sound right
- **Clarity improvements**: Get suggestions to make emails clearer

⭐ Recommended: Upgrade to Grammarly Pro for advanced tone and clarity suggestions to make your emails really connect.

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Writing email copy**: Start with [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]
- **Polishing emails**: Add Grammarly

Ready to automate your email marketing? Try these AI tools today!
